app.title: The Refactory
app.footer: Powered by WebAssembly (QuickJS) · Code runs safely in your browser
auth.tokenPrompt: Create a GitHub Personal Access Token to save your progress and sync solutions across devices.
auth.invalidToken: Invalid token — check that you copied the full string.
ci.consentText: Your code passed locally. We can verify it on our tamper-proof CI by pushing to a public fork of the validator repo on your GitHub.
test.label: Test {index}:
evolution.heading: Base concept mastered. Ready for the next level?
evolution.prompt: Next up: {title}. Your code stays — only the challenge grows.
evolution.forwardIndicator: Your current solution already passes {passCount}/{totalCount} of the next challenge's tests.
app.offline: You are offline. Changes will sync when reconnected.
leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
app.quote: In the land of the blind, the one-eyed man is king.
lint.title: Code Quality
lint.rule.noElse.title: No else
lint.rule.noElse.hint: Use guard clauses with early return instead of else branches.
lint.rule.maxIndent.title: Max 1 indent level
lint.rule.maxIndent.hint: Extract nested blocks into named functions.
lint.rule.noVar.title: No var
lint.rule.noVar.hint: Use const (preferred) or let instead of var.
lint.rule.functionLength.title: Short functions
lint.rule.functionLength.hint: Keep functions under 15 lines. Split into smaller named functions.
lint.rule.noMagicNumbers.title: No magic numbers
lint.rule.noMagicNumbers.hint: Extract numeric literals into named constants.
lint.rule.noNestedTernary.title: No nested ternaries
lint.rule.noNestedTernary.hint: Use guard clauses or a mapping object instead of nested ?:.
lint.rule.shortDotChains.title: Short dot chains
lint.rule.shortDotChains.hint: Avoid chaining more than 2 method calls. Extract intermediate results.
lint.rule.constOverLet.title: const over let
lint.rule.constOverLet.hint: Use const when a variable is never reassigned.
